item.title: Contoso: Agent Governance & DLP

metadata.title: Contoso: Agent Governance & DLP
metadata.description: Apply DLP policies, environment routing, and governance guardrails to agents at Contoso scale.

item.content_markdown:
## Overview

A 300-level partner lab covering governance: data-loss-prevention policies,
environment strategy, and guardrails for agents deployed across a large tenant.

## Topics

- DLP policy zones
- Managed environments and routing
- Audit and monitoring

> Syndicated from Contoso Copilot Labs via the content feed.
